LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT FOX PLAZA APARTMENTS, AKA FP 2001 CO, .LLC, POLK MARKET CO.'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT: 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND; THE CLAIM PREEMPTED BY FEHA. 2ND AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION ARE SUSTAINED WITH 30 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD THAT WHEN PLAINTIFFS' VOURCHERS WERE REFUSED, DEFENDANTS WERE ACCEPTING VOURCHERS FROM NON-DISABLED TENANTS OR FROM TENANTS WITH DIFFERENT DISABILITIES. 4TH AND 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE SUSTAINED WITH 30 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO MORE CLEARLY PLEAD FACTS SUPPORTING THE CLAIM AS TO BUNTJER. 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED AS TO FULTON. 7TH AND 8TH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE OVERRULED. 9TH AND 10TH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE OVERRULED. 11TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND - DUPLICATIVE OF NEGLIGENCE CLAIM. 12TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND; THIS IS A STATUTORY SUIT. 13TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND; DUPLICATIVE OF 12TH CAUSE OF ACTION; 14TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED AS TO FULTON; SUSTAINED WITH 30 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO BUNTJER TO ALLEGE SPECIFIC ACTS AS TO HIM THAT VIOLATED THE COVENANT OF QUIET ENJOYMENT. RULING:
A R G U E D: DEFENDANT FOX PLAZA APARTMENTS, AKA FP 2001 CO, .LLC, POLK MARKET CO.'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT:
1st Cause of Action is SUSTAINED without leave to amend; the claim preempted by FEHA.
2nd and 3rd Causes of Action are SUSTAINED with 30 days leave to amend to plead that when plaintiffs' vourchers were refused, Defendants were accepting vourchers from non-disabled tenants or from tenants with different disabilities.
4th and 5th Causes of Action are SUSTAINED with 30 days leave to amend to more clearly plead facts supporting the claim as to Buntjer.
6th Cause of Action is OVERRULED as to Fulton.
7th and 8th Causes of Action are OVERRULED.
9th and 10th Causes of Action are OVERRULED.
11th Cause of Action is SUSTAINED without leave to amend - duplicative of negligence claim.
12th Cause of Action is SUSTAINED without leave to amend; this is a statutory suit.
13th Cause of Action is SUSTAINED without leave to amend; duplicative of 12th Cause of Action;
14th Cause of Action is OVERRULED as to Fulton; SUSTAINED with 30 days leave to amend as to Buntjer to allege specific acts as to him that violated the covenant of quiet enjoyment. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
